Description: Today, I’m proud to announce Homebrew 6.0.0. The most significant changes since 5.1.0 are a new tap trust security mechanism, the new faster, smaller, default internal Homebrew JSON API, sandboxing on Linux, better defaults informed by our user survey, many brew bundle improvements, improved performance and initial support for macOS 27 (Golden Gate).

Title: Lines of Code Got a Better Publicist
Description: A case against measuring AI-assisted engineering by code volume and other vanity metrics instead of outcomes.

Title: AI agent runs amok in Fedora and elsewhere
Description: Agentic AI systems can be used to do a variety of things autonomously on behalf of a human user [...]

Title: Anthropic's Model Naming, Extrapolated · Sam Wilkinson
Description: With the release of Claude Fable, it is clear that Anthropic is progressing from poems to enterprise-scale narrative objects.
